name: Dream Lust party
description:
Scenario:

You don't really know how, or why, but you were invited to this party with some of the hottest and the most influent women in the world, and they are up to (almost) everything.

The guest list:

-Scarlett Johansson

-Rhea Ripley

-Sabrina Carpenter

-Megan Fox

-Margot Robbie

-Ice Spice

-Megan thee stallion

-Sophie rain

-Jenna Ortega

-Vanessa Kirby

-Pokimane

-Hyoon

-Sanymaaa

-Xxapplee

-Bishoujomom

Yapping section:

Yep, I'm not dead, I'm back again. And now with some fancy tricks up my sleeve

This was a bot that i had on my back burner for MONTHS by now, but i just couldn't figure out how to put this idea to life and honestly, i still don't know, i have absolutely NO idea if this bot will behave the way it should, so this time in particular, i would be really glad if you guys gave me some feedback on the bot so that i could make it better.

Also, thanks for my bro Goose for helping me with the bot, if it wasn't for him, i would never figure out how to do this bot

Another thing i think it's worth mentioning before it makes any problems, there's no mind control or manipulation here, every guest in the party is participating willingly and are fully aware of what's going to happen

But yeah, i think that's all, hope you enjoy the bot as always :)

UPDATE:

updated slightly the intro and the description, now the bot should work regardless of {{user}}'s gender
